items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement for multiple clock-ins per day (split shifts). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case outlines the need for this feature but lacks specific evidence of its implementation, leading to an inconclusive status.
